query_node.name: node
query_node.description: Fetches an object given its ID.

mutation_addUserToAccount.name: addUserToAccount

mutation_addUserToStore.description: Adds a user to a store.

mutation_removeUsersFromUserGroup.name: removeUsersFromUserGroup
mutation_removeUsersFromUserGroup.description: Removes users from a user group.

Checkout.name: Checkout

properties.description: The ID of the object.
The merchant's account UUID.
The URL for redirecting the merchant to the BigCommerce hosted checkout page.
The item(s) associated with the checkout.
The current status of the checkout.

Checkout.description: A container for all information needed to charge a Merchant for products on a one-time or recurring basis.

CheckoutItem.name: CheckoutItem

properties.description: A description of this line item.
The pricing plan denoting how to bill the Merchant for this Product.
The product the Merchant will be entitled to after the Checkout is complete.
The URL used to redirect the Merchant after completing the Checkout.
The scope for this Line Item (e.g. store, account).
The status of this line item.
If available, the ID of the Subscription associated with this Line Item.

CheckoutItem.description: Individual line items describing one-time or recurring charges to be billed to the Merchant upon completing the Checkout.

CheckoutItemConnection.name: CheckoutItemConnection

properties.description: Information to aid in pagination.
A list of edges.

CheckoutItemConnection.description: A connection to a list of items.

properties.description: The item at the end of the edge.
A cursor for use in pagination.

CheckoutItemInput.name: CheckoutItemInput

properties.description: A description the line item.
How to bill the Merchant for this Product.
The product the Merchant will be entitled to after the Checkout is complete.
URL used to redirect the Merchant after successfully completing the Checkout.
The scope for this line item (e.g. store, account).

When left blank, a new subscription will be created upon successful completion of the Checkout. To create a Checkout for updating an existing subscription, include the subscription ID of the existing subscription, which will be updated upon successful completion of the Checkout.

CheckoutItemInput.description: Input needed to create a CheckoutItem.

CheckoutItemPricingInterval.name: CheckoutItemPricingInterval

values.description: Charge the Merchant on a recurring basis each year on their Account's billing day.
Charge the Merchant on a recurring basis each month on their Account's billing day.
Charge the Merchant only one time, immediately.
Charge the Merchant on a recurring basis each quarter on their Account's billing day.
Charge the Merchant on a recurring basis every six months on their Account's billing day.

CheckoutItemPricingInterval.description: The billing interval representing how often to charge the Merchant for this product.

CheckoutItemPricingPlan.name: CheckoutItemPricingPlan

properties.description: The billing interval for the subscription.
The amount to charge for each interval.
Number of days to delay billing to offer a free trial period.

CheckoutItemPricingPlan.description: The container for all pricing information.

CheckoutItemProduct.name: CheckoutItemProduct

properties.description: The unique ID of the product.
A description of the product level, if applicable (e.g. app tier for an application).
The type of product (e.g. APPLICATION).

CheckoutItemProduct.description: The product the Merchant is purchasing.

CheckoutItemProductInput.name: CheckoutItemProductInput

properties.description: Product's unique identifier.
A description of the product level, if applicable. (e.g. app tier for an application).
The type of this product (e.g. APPLICATION).

CheckoutItemProductInput.description: The input information needed to set the CheckoutItemProduct on a CheckoutItem.

values.description: Type for applications available in the BigCommerce App Marketplace.

CheckoutItemScope.name: CheckoutItemScope

properties.description: The unique ID of the scope.
Where to scope access for this item (e.g. STORE).

CheckoutItemScope.description: The scope to which the purchase should be limited.

CheckoutItemScopeInput.name: CheckoutItemScopeInput

properties.description: Scope's unique identifier.
Scope of access for the associated product (e.g. STORE).

CheckoutItemScopeInput.description: The input information needed to set the CheckoutItemScope on a CheckoutItem.

CheckoutItemScopeType.name: CheckoutItemScopeType

values.description: Limits access for the purchased product to a particular Store.

CheckoutItemScopeType.description: The scope of access to be granted upon successful completion of the Checkout.

CheckoutItemStatus.name: CheckoutItemStatus

values.description: The Merchant has been invoiced and any necessary provisioning or Subscription updates have been completed.
This CheckoutItem has been created, but has not yet been accepted by the Merchant.
This CheckoutItem has been approved by the Merchant and BigCommerce is in the process of handling any provisioning or Subscription updates (if necessary).

CheckoutItemStatus.description: The current status of the Checkout Item.

properties.description: Creates a Checkout for a Merchant.

values.description: The Merchant has been invoiced and any necessary provisioning or Subscription updates have been completed.
This Checkout has been created, but has not yet been accepted by the Merchant.
This Checkout has been approved by the Merchant and BigCommerce is in the process of handling any provisioning or Subscription updates (if necessary).

CheckoutStatus.description: The current status of the Checkout.

properties.description: The amount of money.

properties.description: The ISO 4217 currency code.

value.name: BigDecimal
value.description: The `BigDecimal` scalar type represents signed fractional values with arbitrary precision.

properties.description: The monetary amount. Must be a positive decimal number. For example, 10.10 with a currency code of USD represents $10.10.

MoneyInput.description: Input to create a Money object.

Subscription.name: Subscription

properties.description: The ID of the object.
ID of the account associated with the subscription.
The date when the Subscription becomes active, ending any trial period, and billing the Merchant for the first time.
The frequency of charges for the Merchant.
The date the subscription was created.
The end of the current billing interval for the Merchant.
The price the Merchant pays each billing interval.
The product the Merchant is entitled to with this Subscription.
The status of this subscription.
The scope of the subscription.
The date the subscription was last updated.

Subscription.description: A one-time or recurring charge for a Product created as a result of a Merchant completing a Checkout.

SubscriptionBillingInterval.name: SubscriptionBillingInterval

values.description: The Merchant will be billed on a recurring basis each year on their Account's billing day.
The Merchant will be billed on a recurring basis each month on their Account's billing day.
The Merchant was billed one time, at creation, and will not charge on a recurring basis.
The Merchant will be billed only once.
The Merchant will be billed on a recurring basis each quarter on their Account's billing day.
The Merchant will be billed on a recurring basis every six months on their Account's billing day.

SubscriptionBillingInterval.description: The frequency of charges for a Merchant.
